title: Superior Large Foil Containers with Lids Pack of 10 –Sturdy Durable Spacious Foil Trays with Lids - Aluminium Containers 10 x 12 Inch Leak Proof Trays for Cooking Baking BBQ Meal Prep Storage
features: Handle Big Portions with Ease: These 10x12-inch (32x26x6.2 cm) takeaway containers with lids offer ample space to prepare, cook, and serve family favorites without mess or overflow. Perfect for everything from lasagna to BBQ ribs, they simplify meal prep for gatherings

Heavy-Duty & Durable: Made from thick, premium aluminum, these foil trays are built tough. No bending or leaking, even with heavy foods! From prep to oven to table, these food containers with lids maintain their shape and keep your food looking delicious

Snap-On, Spill-Proof Lids: Say goodbye to spills. Each foil tray has a secure-fitting lid that locks in freshness and prevents messes. These aluminium foil trays are perfect for transporting food to parties, picnics, or storing meals safely in the fridge

Heat and Cold Resistant: Designed to go directly from freezer to oven, these tin foil containers with lids can handle it all. Perfect for baking, reheating, or freezing; a true kitchen lifesaver for busy families and meal preppers

Eco-Friendly & Disposable: These take away container with lid are made to simplify cleanup. Just toss them when you’re done and feel good knowing they’re recyclable. Pack of 10 great for parties, events, or busy days when you need easy, disposable options
